description.value:
Trigger A creature fails its Reflex save against your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Fire Breath].

Your flames are a fearsome sight to behold, blazing through all who oppose you. Choose one creature that failed its Reflex save against your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Fire Breath]. Attempt an Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] that enemy; you don't take a penalty for not sharing a language.
